entries.description: MCP server for running a code snippet and showing the result. Supports 40+ programming languages including JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, PHP, Perl, Ruby, Go, Lua, Groovy, PowerShell, BAT/CMD, BASH/SH, F# Script, C# Script, VBScript, CoffeeScript, Scala, Swift, Julia, Crystal, OCaml, R, AppleScript, Elixir, Clojure, Racket, Scheme, AutoHotkey, AutoIt, Kotlin Script, Dart, Haskell, Nim, Lisp, V, SCSS and Sass.
representativeQueries: run this python snippet and show the output
run this shell script and return the result
